ab: karuwa ku kiveras da paysu kannu?
ch: A:我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: man adi diyamaw? kiyaveras u da pidaya?
ch: B:哪裡不行? 你要借多少錢?

ab: malalup ku minada da paysu, karuwa ku kiveras kannu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: yi! maresan ta adi ku miinada paysu!
ch: B:喔！我們一樣，我也沒帶錢耶!
en: B: Oh! We're the same, and I don't have any money!

ab: adi ku malalup minada da paysu, karuwa ku paveras kannu.
ch: A:我沒忘記帶錢，我可以借錢給你.
en: A: I didn't forget to bring money, I can lend you money.

ab: inau, nanu kiniveras kaningku na paysu a adaman mu, adi u diya paveriyas kaning ku.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: karuwa ku kiveras kananu kavang?
ch: A:我可以借你的衣服嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: kemadu diyamaw? alaku.
ch: B:有何不可?拿去。
en: B: Why not? Take it.

ab: karuwa ku kiveras kananu valray?
ch: A:我可以借你的書嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ku paverasanay lra kani Saya.
ch: B:我借給Saya了。
en: B: I lent it to Saya.

ab: paverasanay ku diya kananu dinsiya ay?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ai, aymu nu ’emanan paveriyasaw ku.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: ma’udalr lra, adi ku miinada da suku, paverasay ku diya a?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: sesaya ku suku di, mukasaya ta misuku nu kemadu.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: mau nanu ipaveras kaningku adaman ini na valray a, pavaveriyas ku lra kannu, lrayuwan!
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還你了！謝謝你！
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I'm returning it to you! Thank you!

ab: maranger u diya mena’u da kumuda na valray, rengayaw ku lra.
ch: B:你還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B: You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: pavaveriyas ku lra nu aydan kanu da paysu?
ch: A:我什麼時候要還你錢?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: kakuda! nu mipaysu u lra nu aydan mu, na’uwi lra.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: pavaveriyas u lra nu aydan kaningku na paysu?
ch: A:你什麼時候要還我錢?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: nu ’emanan lra ku paveriyasaw u lra.
ch: B:我明天還你。
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: pavaveriyas u lra nu aydan kaningku na valray?
ch: A:你什麼時候要還我書?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: adi ku paveriyas kannu adaman diyamaw?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: mau i Hosiw na paveras kaninu ini na inpic?
ch: A:這支筆是Hosiw借你的嗎?
en: A: Did Hosiw lend you this pen?

ab: ai, nangku kiniveras kanintaw harem kanini na wari.
ch: B:對，我今天跟他借的。
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: mau nanu kiniveras kani Hosiw ini na inpic?
ch: A:這支筆是你跟Hosiw借的嗎?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Hosiw?

ab: melri, mau tu cinima’an kaningku ni nani.
ch: B:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: B: No, my mom bought this for me.

ab: uniyan lra ta ’ateri, uwa diya kiveras kani Rumi.
ch: A:我們沒有鹽了，先去跟Rumi借點鹽。
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Rumi first.

ab: ai, kayku diya kiverasa.
ch: B:好，我去借。
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: uwa paveriyasu da paysu kaningku kuwayu i Rumi.
ch: A:去叫Rumi還我錢。
en: B: Go tell Rumi to give me my money back.

ab: pidaya paysu tu kiyam kannu?
ch: B:她欠你多少錢呢?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
